headline: What is Excellence Behind the Wheel? Sysco’s 25 Inductees to the 2026 IFDA Truck Driver Hall of Fame
summary: Sysco's 2026 IFDA Hall of Fame Inductees Join us in congratulating our 25 outstanding delivery partners inducted into the 2026 IFDA Hall of Fame. We thank them for their hard work, dedication and loyalty to our customers and communities. HOUSTON, July 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sysco Corporation (SYY) is proud to announce that 25 delivery partners have been named to the International Foodservice Distributors Association (IFDA) 2026 Truck Driver Hall of Fame, one of the highest honors in foodse
